spoken_passage: The exact sentence spoken during this shot.

visual_audio_alignment.transformation_asserted: What transformation does the spoken passage describe?
visual_audio_alignment.what_viewer_sees: Describe the literal frame — colors, shapes, motion.
visual_audio_alignment.why_it_matches: Explain in 2-4 sentences WHY this visual enacts this transformation.

new_shot_justification: Why this must be a new shot, not part of previous. Reject: pacing, variety, new sentence. Valid: new subject, new logical operation, reversal, scale change, resolution, continuity handoff.
bad_first_visual: What a lazy illustrator would make.
rejected_because: Why that lazy visual fails to enact the transformation.
